title: Rice salad – leftover rice
excerpt: There's usually rice left over after a meal. Don't throw it away. Dress her up in a different little frock and enjoy her as a side dish or as a meal. See what's in your fridge and work from there. In my rice salad: chives ham red pepper cheese …

seo.title: Rice salad - leftover rice - Marinda Kook

html:
There's usually rice left over after a meal. Don't throw it away. Dress her up in a different little frock and enjoy her as a side dish or as a meal. See what's in your fridge and work from there.

In my rice salad:

  • chives
  • ham
  • red pepper
  • cheese
  • 2 cups rice

NOW:

  1. Chop everything finely and add to the rice.
  2. Add 5 ml salt and pepper to taste.
  3. Mix it through.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

NOW THE DRESSING:

  • 250ml mayonnaise
  • 60 ml milk
  • 20 ml curry powder
  • juice of one lemon
  • 60 ml chutney

Mix everything for the dressing and stir it through your rice salad. Enjoy it on its own or together with a meal.

OTHER OPTIONS

  • tuna, gherkins, finely chopped onion
  • broccoli florets, blue cheese and nuts
  • raisins and chopped dried peaches/ or preserved peaches
  • pear, blue cheese and nuts

What you put in depends on what you like. How much you put in – that's your choice.
